sizing_rule.note: Position sizing derived from optimal f calculated from historical trade distribution. Enforce sigma bounds: losses capped at -4σ (-$6,642.79), profits capped at +6.94σ (+$12,428.15). Convert percentage P&L to absolute values using current underlying price. Specific optimal_f value not provided in excerpt; requires historical model calibration.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be calibrated using optimal f derived from historical trade distribution, ensuring trades remain within modeled bounds (losses not exceeding -4 sigmas and profits not exceeding +6.94 sigmas) to accurately predict future trade distributions.
